title: Hosted Chat URL incorrectly shows localhost
symptom: The 'Chat URL' in the 'When chat message received' node shows 'http://localhost:5678/' instead of the public URL, leading to a 404 error when accessed.
applies_when: N8N_HOST and N8N_PROTOCOL are set correctly
not_this_if: Chat URL displays correctly in other environments
root_cause: The issue arises because n8n generates the chat URL based on the webhook URL environment variable. If this variable is not set correctly, it defaults to localhost, causing the incorrect URL to be displayed.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable WEBHOOK_URL to your public domain (e.g., https://n8n-y3ej.onrender.com)
Restart the n8n instance to apply the changes
Check the 'Chat URL' in the 'When chat message received' node again
agent_instruction: Update the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable to your public domain and restart n8n.
